name: aaarrr-flywheel-toolkit
description: Growth-engineering toolkit. Funnel + flywheel completo: pricing strategy → landing-page design → instrumentation (Pixel + GA4 + PostHog + UTM) → AAARRR ejecución sobre Meta Marketing API. Awareness/Acquisition/Activation/Revenue como funnel lineal; Retention/Referral cierran el loop como flywheel que retroalimenta Acquisition con LAL audiences y K-factor real. Mantra: fail fast, fail often, fail cheap, fail forward.
